# Add deployment and hosting guide

Document a recommended deployment flow for the project (Vercel/Netlify for frontend, Railway/Heroku for backend or Docker-compose) with environment variable instructions and minimal cost recommendations.

Acceptance criteria:
- Add `docs/deploy.md` with step-by-step deploy guide and environment variables
- Provide a sample `docker-compose.production.yml` or guidance

Labels: ssoc:good-first-issue, SSOC, docs
